headline: 3 Reasons to Sell SWKS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Skyworks Solutions currently trades at $65.78 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 2.1%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.3% gain during that period.

headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.

headline: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Joins Two Russell Defensive Indexes
summary: Skyworks Solutions (NasdaqGS:SWKS) has been newly added to the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive Index. The company has also joined the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, highlighting its inclusion in key defensive equity benchmarks. Skyworks Solutions enters these indices at a time when its stock has faced pressure, with the share price at $65.93 and the stock down 7.7% over the past week and 12.7% over the past month. Over longer periods the stock has also declined, including 12.1% over the past...
